Notes: Service Advisor candidates must show strong communication, customer trust-building, ownership, pace, and ability to explain diagnostics, timelines, and estimates without pressure.
Technician candidates must show diagnostic discipline, testing-before-replacing mindset, documentation ability, European vehicle experience, and comeback prevention thinking.
Lube Tech candidates must show coachability, safety awareness, basic inspection ability, attention to detail, and readiness to grow into higher-level technical work.
Valet / Porter candidates must show dependability, professionalism, safe vehicle handling, attention to customer property, and ability to follow process consistently.
Parts candidates must show accuracy, urgency, vendor communication, part matching discipline, ETA communication, and documentation ability.
CX candidates must show hospitality, emotional control, professional communication, follow-through, customer empathy, and ability to protect the Frank’s experience.
Admin candidates must show organization, accuracy, confidentiality, follow-through, communication, and ability to support operations without creating confusion.
Shop Foreman candidates must show leadership, diagnostic judgment, technician coaching ability, workflow control, quality standards, accountability, and calm decision-making.
